hero.heading: Real coffee. Real people.
hero.subheading: Honolulu Avenue's neighborhood roast — pulled fresh, served warm, since the morning crowd started showing up.

about.heading: A Glendale morning ritual.
paragraphs: We started Jeremy's because Honolulu Avenue needed a place where the coffee was real, the seats were warm, and the regulars knew your name.
Single-origin beans, hand-poured drip, espresso pulled the slow way. Pastries baked fresh every morning. A community two doors down from where the day starts.

services.title: Single-origin espresso
services.description: Pulled from beans we taste-tested every batch — bright, full, ridiculously smooth.

services.title: Hand-poured drip
services.description: Brewed slow. The way coffee was meant to taste — patient, balanced, unmistakable.

services.title: Fresh-baked pastries
services.description: Croissants, scones, and breakfast bites. The kind that disappear before lunch.

services.title: Iced & cold brew
services.description: Slow-steeped 18 hours. Smooth enough you'll forget it's iced.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Best coffee in Glendale. Period. The baristas remember your order, the croissants are always fresh, and the vibe is exactly what a neighborhood spot should feel like.

reviews.name: Mark T.
reviews.text: Tucked-away gem on Honolulu Ave. The kind of latte you'd drive across town for. The almond croissant is perfection.

reviews.name: Anna L.
reviews.text: Honolulu Ave's worst-kept secret. Cozy, warm, and the espresso is on point every single visit.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Jeremy's Coffee Shop 3009 Honolulu Ave Glendale CA

seo.title: Jeremy's Coffee Shop — Glendale, CA · Honolulu Ave
seo.description: Glendale's neighborhood coffee shop on Honolulu Ave. Single-origin espresso, hand-poured drip, fresh-baked pastries. 4.6★ · 548 reviews.
